name: 更好的故障机器人 / Better Defect
author: Codex
description: v103/vPC compatible full build: restores 26 old Defect cards, keeps cross-run strict zero-sum rarity-local dynamic odds and per-card disabled-state persistence, fixes Fission orb visuals, restores the starter Strike -> Ball Lightning replacement, no BaseLib. Encyclopedia-only card disabling, 14 historical card versions and 11 additional custom common-card transformations share a persistent 35-point budget. v0.9.0 adds the user-designed Barrage, Beam Cell, Charge Battery, Cold Snap, Go for the Eyes, Gunk Up, Leap, Lightning Rod, Sweeping Beam, Uproar, Recursion and Streamline transformations.
